  • Method Details

    • historianTag

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder historianTag(String historianTag)
      Sets the historian tag used by the plant-data source.
      Parameters:
      historianTag - historian tag name, or empty when unavailable
      Returns:
      this builder

    • pidReference

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder pidReference(String pidReference)
      Sets the P&ID or document reference.
      Parameters:
      pidReference - source reference such as a symbol tag or line identifier
      Returns:
      this builder

    • automationAddress

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder automationAddress(String automationAddress)
      Sets the NeqSim automation address.
      Parameters:
      automationAddress - address such as "Valve.percentValveOpening"
      Returns:
      this builder

    • unit

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder unit(String unit)
      Sets the engineering unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit string accepted by the target NeqSim variable
      Returns:
      this builder

    • role

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder role(InstrumentTagRole role)
      Sets the integration role.
      Parameters:
      role - input, benchmark, or virtual role
      Returns:
      this builder

    • description

      public OperationalTagBinding.Builder description(String description)
      Sets a human-readable description.
      Parameters:
      description - binding description
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public OperationalTagBinding build()
      Builds the immutable binding.
      Returns:
      operational tag binding
